description: A junior developer migrated this WordPress site from 'http://staging.local' to 'http://localhost' using a raw SQL dump. Because WordPress stores many settings as serialized PHP arrays, the raw SQL replace corrupted data, and the site is currently stuck in a redirect loop. Perform a serialization-safe database search and replace to change all instances of 'http://staging.local' to 'http://localhost' across the entire database. The WordPress directory is located at /var/www/html/wordpress. Do not hardcode the URL in wp-config.php; the database values must be updated so that content, image links, and serialized widgets are permanently fixed. The website frontend at http://localhost/ must load successfully upon completion.
